title: CI / CD
objectives: Distinguish CI vs CD vs CD (deployment vs delivery)
Design a mobile pipeline: lint → test → build → sign → distribute
Add safety: env promotion, approvals, rollback

sections.markdown: **CI (Continuous Integration)** merges code to main frequently and runs automated tests on every push. **CD** can mean two things: **Continuous Delivery** (build is always production-ready; humans click to deploy) or **Continuous Deployment** (every merged change auto-deploys).

sections.code:
Canonical mobile pipeline:
  push -> checkout -> deps cache -> analyze / lint
       -> unit + widget tests
       -> build (Android AAB / iOS IPA) with per-flavor keys
       -> sign (upload / distribute) artifacts
       -> [approval gate]
       -> promote: internal → beta → production

sections.markdown: A mature mobile pipeline has three signals that gate promotion: **tests green, static analysis clean, and a stability floor** (crash-free % from the current shipped version). Regression on any of those blocks promotion — this is what turns 'we ship weekly' into 'we ship safely, weekly'.

Baking secrets into pipeline logs. Use masked secrets, never `echo $TOKEN`, and rotate credentials on team member turnover. Also: mutable version tags (`v1`) — pin actions/images by SHA in security-sensitive workflows.
Fast pipelines beat perfect ones — target <10 min from push to signal. Cache dependencies, run tests in parallel, split unit vs integration, run heavier jobs post-merge on main.

flashcards.back: Delivery = always production-ready; humans click to deploy. Deployment = every merged change auto-deploys.
Tests green + static analysis clean + crash-free % stable.
Mutable tags (like v1) can silently change, injecting new/malicious code.

quiz.explain: Fully automated all the way to prod.

quiz.q: Target CI feedback time for mobile is…

challenges.text: Add a CI job that runs `flutter analyze` and unit tests on every PR.
Add a nightly build job that produces signed AAB + IPA artifacts.
Add promotion pipeline: main → App Distribution nightly → Play Internal weekly → Prod on tag.
Add crash-free % gate that blocks production promotion.

interviewQuestions: How would you design a mobile CI/CD pipeline?
How do you speed up a slow pipeline?
How do you gate production promotion?
